# known_psyq_stdlib.txt -- auto-generated by tools/psyq_stdlib_scan.py
# Each line: <func>  <kind>  <evidence>
# Kind prefixes:
#   bios_table_*    BIOS jump table call (allowed-as-asm exception)
#   syscall_kernel  raw syscall/break (allowed-as-asm exception)
#   psyq_<name>     PsyQ stdlib heuristic match (replace with C idiom)
#   handwritten_asm uses GCC-unfriendly mnemonics; pin to asm or rewrite

# 2026-05-16: removed 13 false-positive psyq_memcpy/psyq_memset entries.
#   Per tools/propose_function_names.py stricter detector, these were
#   in-place transforms or contextually unrelated lbu/sb loops (halving,
#   bit-twiddle, eff_init, etc.), NOT memcpy/memset implementations.
#   Source and destination base registers were the same.
#   Removed: func_80016C80, func_80035438, func_80035FE0, func_800397A0,
#            func_8003A42C, func_800550E8, func_80079194, func_8007A28C,
#            func_8008339C, func_80083644, func_80086014, func_80087F34,
#            func_8008AE7C
